register.title: Create your account
register.checkEmail: If the address is valid, we've sent an activation email. Please check your inbox.

activate.title: Activate your account
activate.success: Your account has been activated. You can sign in now.
activate.error: This activation link is invalid or has expired. Try signing in or request a new one.

errors.notActivated: This account is not activated yet. Check your inbox.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
